modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open existing Excel workbook from previous version.

full_description_text: User is trying to access a workbook made in an older Excel version. They can't seem to get it open. This is causing delays in their work, and they need it sorted out quickly.
short_description: Unable to open existing Excel workbook from previous version.
description: User is trying to access a workbook made in an older Excel version. They can't seem to get it open. This is causing delays in their work, and they need it sorted out quickly.
